title: Stepdads The Stepdads Les Mis
description: Cult comedy pioneers Stepdads present the world’s first ever stage adaptation of Victor Hugo’s novel. They will be joined by alternative comedy’s finest to faithfully adapt this colossal epic, including the 58 page digression on the Battle of Waterloo. Previous acts include: Mark Silcox, Joz Norris, Josh Glanc, Elf Lyons, Lorna Rose Treen, Christian Brighty and more! Stepdads are BAFTA-winning Disney+ heartthrob Luke Rollason (★★★★ “gloriously daft” Telegraph) and The Flop’s Tom Penn (★★★★★ “Nothing happens” BeyondTheJoke).

venue.name: WundaBarn at The SpiegelGardens
venue.address: Victoria Gardens, Brighton and Hove, East Sussex

reviews.reviewer: By The Reviews Hub - East Anglia & South East May 26, 2025 Updated: August 10, 2
reviews.excerpt: A ludicrous clown-fuelled parade with side notes of this classic, formerly-sombre tale. Stepdads, led by the whimsical wunderkind duo of Luke Rollason and Tom Penn, tackleLes Misfor their latest adaptation. Taking on a complicated storyline with wanton abandon, these clowns make light work of finding revelry. Penn stars in the titular role of Jean Valjean, with Luke Rollason in the classic post of
